title: Magnificently Crispy German Sardine Skewers
description: A funky and fluffy German dish featuring crispy fried sardines, perfect as a hangover cure, and is paleo-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the coconut oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, mix together almond flour, onion powder, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs and lemon juice.
Add the chopped sardines to the egg mixture and stir until they are well coated.
Add the sardine mixture to the almond flour mixture and stir until the sardines are evenly coated.
Thread the coated sardines onto skewers, leaving a small space between each sardine.
Deep fry the sardine skewers in the preheated coconut oil for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Remove the skewers from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Sprinkle the chopped parsley over the skewers and serve immediately.
